description: Deed of sale for the sale of half a house in Fusṭāṭ, in the ‘Fortress of the Greeks’ (qaṣr al-Rūm known as the qaṣr al-shamʿ). The house abuts the house of ʿUbayd b. Yasir. The deed also mentions Abū l-Ḥusayn the drinks-seller. Dated 497 AH (= 1103-1104 CE). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
